_provenance: schema-derived from autotuner.py optuna.create_study — determinism requirement from AC-V1 mandate
_assertion_strategy: run run_calibration_sweep twice with same deterministic sampler seed and same fixture history; assert param recommendations are identical across both runs
requirement: same fixture input + same seed => same proposed_value for each param in every report row
prohibited_pattern: non-deterministic sampler (no seed) makes golden-fixture comparison impossible and hides implementation variance
